response.justification: The candidate is an experienced full-stack engineer (web, mobile, some embedded), but the profile does not match this embedded networking security role. There is no evidence of native-level Japanese (a hard requirement), no Linux kernel source modification, no L2/L3 networking or switch experience, and no security technologies such as MACsec, 802.1X, or device tamper detection. C/C++ exposure exists but is dated (National Instruments, 2014–2015) and not in a UNIX firmware/networking context. The bulk of the career is TypeScript/Node/DLang web and platform work, which is largely orthogonal to the requirements.
strengths: Broad, long software engineering track record across web, mobile, and some embedded systems
Some C/C++ experience (NI LabWindows/CVI) and Linux familiarity
Strong engineering discipline: TDD, CI/CD, dev-ops tooling
concerns: No native-level Japanese, which is a stated hard requirement
No Linux kernel modification, networking (L2/L3, switches), or security tech (MACsec, 802.1X)
Embedded/C work is minimal and dated; core background is web/full-stack

key_factors.factor: No embedded networking security / kernel experience
